name: agent_lightning_credit_assignment_gate
description: Native Rust measurable gate for decoupled trajectory-to-transition credit assignment, inspired by Agent Lightning mechanism; no external code copied.

source_digest.mechanism: Decouple agent execution from RL training; model execution as MDP; decompose trajectories into training transitions with credit assignment.
Minimal bash-only linear coding-agent loop with sandboxed command execution and SWE-bench verification.
source_digest.measurable_gate: future: shell-action transition schema and verifier pass/fail gate

source_digest.mechanism: Verbal reinforcement through feedback reflection stored in episodic memory; no weight update.
source_digest.measurable_gate: future: reflection changes next attempt policy and improves pass rate

truth_gate.scope_boundary: Only a credit assignment gate is implemented; full RL trainer/fine-tuning is not integrated.
